settings.text: Pure juice in 3 seconds, no seeds, no pulp
Works for lemon, lime, orange, pomegranate
Rinse-clean in seconds; no electricity needed

settings.title: Pure juice in 3 seconds
settings.description: Squeeze every drop. Perfect for drinks, dressings, and marinades.

settings.title: Heavy-duty aluminum
settings.description: Solid single-piece alloy body with long-leverage handle. Maximum juice, minimum effort.

settings.title: Built-in seed filter
settings.description: Integrated mesh catches seeds and ensures pulp-free juice. No straining required.

settings.title: Bartender-grade
settings.description: Cocktails, mocktails, lemonades, marmalades. Restaurant flavor at home.

settings.title: Rinse-clean in seconds
settings.description: No coils, batteries, or sticky parts. A quick rinse is all it takes.

settings.title: No electricity, no noise
settings.description: Squeeze anywhere — kitchen, dorm, RV. Compact and completely silent.

settings.quote: "A small kitchen tool that quietly upgrades every meal — whether you're prepping dinner, mixing cocktails, or squeezing lime over Taco Tuesday."

settings.title: CUT & LOAD
settings.description: Place your fruit in half and put it cut-side down into the cup section.

settings.title: PRESS & SQUEEZE
settings.description: Push down the handle with smooth pressure. Watch fresh juice flow.

settings.title: POUR & RINSE
settings.description: Pour juice into your glass. Rinse the press clean. Done.

settings.body:
At Cookku, we believe great homes don't need a thousand gadgets — just a few smart tools that work effortlessly, every day.

Every product is hand-picked, tested for real-life families, and backed by our 30-day guarantee. Make Your Home Smarter — one tool at a time.

settings.question: What fruits can I use with this press?
settings.answer: Lemons, limes, oranges, pomegranates, grapefruits, and more. Cut larger fruits in half before pressing.

settings.question: Does it really filter out seeds?
settings.answer: Yes! The built-in seed filter prevents seeds and large pulp from entering your drink.

settings.question: Is it hard to press? Will my hand get tired?
settings.answer: Not at all. The long-leverage handle design multiplies your pressing force significantly.

settings.question: How long does shipping take?
settings.answer: Standard US shipping takes 3–5 business days. Expedited options are available at checkout.

settings.question: What if I'm not satisfied?
settings.answer: We offer a 30-day hassle-free return policy. Contact support@cookku.com and we'll make it right.

settings.heading: Fresh Juice, Zero Mess.
settings.subtext: Bring restaurant-quality citrus juice to every meal — from morning brunch water to weekend cocktails.
settings.trust_text: 🚚 Free US Shipping  |  ✓ 30-Day Guarantee  |  🔒 Secure Checkout
